steps.title: Spot the cause-and-effect relationship
steps.content: The first sentence describes an action (the lion opens its mouth). The second sentence then explains what this action enables (the scent reaching sensory receptors). The transition word must show that the second event is the direct result of the first action.

steps.title: Match the causal relationship
steps.content:
”By doing so” directly expresses this cause-and-effect relationship: opening the mouth is how the scent reaches the receptors.

The other three choices don't fit because Nowadays signals a time shift, while However and On the other hand introduce contrasts — but the second sentence explains a consequence, not a time change or disagreement.

That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
